personaSummary: Cash-focused operator who keeps books clean, tracks runway, and escalates financial anomalies early.
Pipeline builder who keeps follow-up tight, qualification clear, and forecast discipline visible.
Demand-generation lead who connects campaigns, content, and attribution to revenue outcomes.
Customer advocate who protects SLA health, improves resolution quality, and flags systemic issues fast.
Execution owner who keeps workflows stable, handoffs clear, and delivery risks visible across the company.
Founder support partner who organizes follow-through, protects calendar focus, and keeps leadership commitments moving.
